title: Onotrophe acaulis
taxonomy: Onotrophe acaulis is a genus of flowering plants in the family Amaryllidaceae. It is native to tropical Africa and consists of a single species. The classification of Onotrophe acaulis is within the family of Amaryllidaceae, which is a large and diverse group of flowering plants. This plant is often found in shaded areas and has a unique appearance. Onotrophe acaulis has a bulbous habit and produces white or yellow flowers.

intro: Onotrophe acaulis, also known as Onotrophe, is a plant species native to tropical Africa, belonging to the family Amaryllidaceae. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties, making it useful in treating various conditions such as fever, respiratory infections, and skin disorders.
